science-nature-starter.moon-parent.helen.prompt: What phenomenon produces an electric current when magnetic flux through a circuit changes?
science-nature-starter.moon-parent.helen.explanation: Electromagnetic induction creates an electromotive force when magnetic flux changes.
science-nature-starter.moon-parent.helen.details: Moving a magnet relative to a coil, moving the coil, or changing the magnetic field can induce a voltage. Electric generators use this principle to convert mechanical energy into electrical energy.

science-nature-starter.disease-specialty.prompt: Which conserved quantity explains why a spinning skater speeds up when pulling in their arms?
science-nature-starter.disease-specialty.explanation: Conservation of angular momentum makes the skater rotate faster as rotational inertia decreases.
science-nature-starter.disease-specialty.details: Pulling the arms inward concentrates mass closer to the rotation axis and lowers the moment of inertia. With little external torque, angular momentum stays nearly constant, so angular speed rises.

science-nature-starter.moon-parent.angrb.prompt: Which scale ranks minerals by their resistance to scratching?
science-nature-starter.moon-parent.angrb.explanation: The Mohs scale compares mineral hardness by testing which materials can scratch others.
science-nature-starter.moon-parent.angrb.details: Talc defines hardness 1 and diamond hardness 10. The scale is ordinal rather than linear, so diamond is far more than twice as hard as a mineral ranked 5.

science-nature-starter.scientist-field.h.prompt: What is the increasing concentration of a persistent contaminant at higher levels of a food chain called?
science-nature-starter.scientist-field.h.explanation: Biomagnification is the rise in contaminant concentration from one trophic level to the next.
science-nature-starter.scientist-field.h.details: Persistent chemicals stored in tissues can become increasingly concentrated as predators consume many contaminated prey. Bioaccumulation describes buildup within one organism over time; biomagnification describes the increase across a food web.

science-nature-starter.disease-specialty.prompt: What microscopic functional unit of the kidney filters blood and helps form urine?
science-nature-starter.disease-specialty.explanation: The nephron is the kidney's microscopic unit for filtration and urine formation.
science-nature-starter.disease-specialty.details: Blood is first filtered at the renal corpuscle. The nephron's tubules then selectively reabsorb water and useful solutes, secrete additional wastes, and adjust the final composition of urine.

source.label: National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases

science-nature-starter.moon-parent.polyd.prompt: What term describes indirect protection when enough people in a population are immune to an infection?
science-nature-starter.moon-parent.polyd.explanation: Herd immunity reduces transmission when immunity is widespread enough in a population.
science-nature-starter.moon-parent.polyd.details: When an infectious person is less likely to encounter someone susceptible, chains of transmission are more likely to stop. The immunity threshold differs by disease and does not mean every individual is protected.

science-nature-starter.scientist-field.m.prompt: Which type of cell division halves the chromosome number to produce gametes?
science-nature-starter.scientist-field.m.explanation: Meiosis reduces a diploid chromosome set to haploid cells used in sexual reproduction.
science-nature-starter.scientist-field.m.details: One round of DNA replication is followed by two divisions. Homologous chromosomes separate in meiosis I, sister chromatids separate in meiosis II, and crossing over contributes to genetic variation.

science-nature-starter.disease-specialty.prompt: Which common statistic measures how spread out data values are around their mean?
science-nature-starter.disease-specialty.explanation: Standard deviation measures the typical spread of data values around the mean.
science-nature-starter.disease-specialty.details: A small standard deviation indicates values clustered near the mean, while a larger one indicates greater dispersion. It is the square root of variance and uses the same units as the original data.

science-nature-starter.moon-parent.mundi.prompt: What semiconductor component can act as an electronic switch or amplifier?
science-nature-starter.moon-parent.mundi.explanation: A transistor controls current or voltage and can function as a switch or amplifier.
science-nature-starter.moon-parent.mundi.details: Digital processors use enormous numbers of transistors as fast electronic switches. In analog circuits, small input changes can control larger output signals, allowing amplification.
